docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,574.27 FILED BY WOLFE, HUNTER AS TO DEFENDANT KERSTEN, ALEK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 SERVED FEB-06-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KERSTEN, ALEK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF HUNTER WOLFE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEK KERSTEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOLFE, HUNTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KERSTEN, ALEK $734.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $834.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KERSTEN, ALEK
